sections.paragraph: m. Gen 1:6, , Psa 19:2 fully רְקִיעַ הַשָּׁמַיִם Gen 1:14, 15 , 17 , 20 , etc. the firmament of heaven, spread out like a hemisphere above the earth (from the root רָקַע), like a splendid and pellucid sapphire ( Exo 24:10, compare Dan 12:3), to which the stars were supposed to be fixed, and over which the Hebrews believed there was a heavenly ocean ( Gen 1:7 7:11 Psa 104:3 148:4 compare, however, Gen 2:6). LXX. στερέωμα. Vulg. firmamentum. Luth. Befte.
